'''''Red Gauntlet''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of Warlord [[Zsinj]]. It participated in the [[Battle of Vahaba]], attacking [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]]'s ''[[Stellar Web]]'' along with Zsinj's [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Serpent's Smile]]''. The attack failed due to mass fire and superior tactics on behalf of the temporarily allied [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and ''Serpent's Smile'' was destroyed. ''Red Gauntlet'' surrendered shortly after, under the guns of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] ''[[Crynyd]]'' and [[Skyhook (Star Destroyer)|''Skyhook'']], as well as ''Stellar Web''. General Solo captured ''Red Gauntlet'' by putting a crew aboard her and discussed using her against Zsinj until she was reassigned.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
